headline: FBI says it disrupted alleged plot targeting UFC event at White House
summary: FBI Director Kash Patel said multiple people are in custody after law enforcement disrupted an alleged plot targeting Sunday’s UFC event at the White House.

raw.headline: FBI says it disrupted alleged plot targeting UFC event at White House
raw.summary: FBI Director Kash Patel said multiple people are in custody after law enforcement disrupted an alleged plot targeting Sunday’s UFC event at the White House.

headline: Bernie Sanders Slams White House UFC Fight As 'Kleptocracy' Over $12,000 Trump Coin Sales: 'They Are The...'
summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders slams Trump family for hosting a UFC fight at the White House and profiting via $12K Trump-branded coins.
